# GovHub

> AI proposal writing platform built for government contractors. Drafts, reviews, and formats federal, state, and local RFP responses with awareness of Section L/M structure, FAR/DFARS clauses, and Section 508 conformance. Built for solo consultants, small-business contractors (8(a), WOSB, SDVOSB, HUBZone), and system integrators.

## Product

- [AI proposal generator](https://www.govhub.online/solutions/ai-proposal-generator/): Drafts government RFP responses from the solicitation and your knowledge base.
- [Compliance matrix generator](https://www.govhub.online/solutions/compliance-matrix-generator/): Free tool — turns RFP text into a Section L/M compliance matrix you can export.
- [RFP shredding](https://www.govhub.online/solutions/rfp-shredding/): Extracts every requirement, instruction, and evaluation factor from a solicitation.
- [Form autofiller](https://www.govhub.online/solutions/form-autofiller/): SF-33, SF-1449, SF330, reps & certs autofilled from a shared company profile.
- [SF330 software](https://www.govhub.online/solutions/sf330/): Automates the SF330 architect-engineer qualifications form.
- [Technical writer review](https://www.govhub.online/solutions/technical-writer-review/): Automated review for compliance drift and evaluation-criteria alignment.
- [Template generator](https://www.govhub.online/solutions/template-generator/): Compliant response templates and formatting.
- [Solutions overview](https://www.govhub.online/solutions/)
- [Pricing](https://www.govhub.online/pricing/): Plans for solo contractors, small businesses, and system integrators; 14-day free trial.

## For

- [Small business contractors](https://www.govhub.online/for/small-business-contractors/): Win federal work without hiring a proposal team.
- [System integrators](https://www.govhub.online/for/system-integrators/): Coordinate multi-team pursuits without losing days to formatting.
